title: onosma pseudoarenaria subsp. albanica
intro: Onosma pseudoarenaria subsp. albanica, also known as Albanian Asclepiad or Albanian Onosma, is a subspecies of plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to Albania and parts of the Balkan region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly due to its alkaloid content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Onosma pseudoarenaria subsp. albanica include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, wounds, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly consumed for its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
